texto: You are not judged by your success, but rather, how you respond to your failures.
explicacao: Citação de T.W. Brown sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “You are not judged by your success, but rather, how you respond to your failures.” articula motivacao, inspirational-attitude, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.

frase_original: You are not judged by your success, but rather, how you respond to your failures.

texto: Ladies, what in the world is wrong with men? I mean besides all the really obvious stuff. They think they have the handle on everything. And if a lady gets in behind the wheel of a sports car, they act all crazy, like we don't belong. Same thing with motorcycles. Let a gal cruise down the highway on her hog and you'd think she was Lady Godiva for all the stares that she gets. I got news for you, just because we don't...doesn't mean that we can't. Seriously, boys, you can be replaced by a few inches of rubber and a couple of D-cell batteries, so I wouldn't be too cocky.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a T.W. Brown: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Ladies, what in the world is wrong with men? I mean besides all the really obvious stuff. They th…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, men, women pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de women.

frase_original: Ladies, what in the world is wrong with men? I mean besides all the really obvious stuff. They think they have the handle on everything. And if a lady gets in behind the wheel of a sports car, they act all crazy, like we don't belong. Same thing with motorcycles. Let a gal cruise down the highway on her hog and you'd think she was Lady Godiva for all the stares that she gets. I got news for you, just because we don't...doesn't mean that we can't. Seriously, boys, you can be replaced by a few inches of rubber and a couple of D-cell batteries, so I wouldn't be too cocky.
